titleStmt.title: SII 42.15: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 15. (A.R. No. B. 22 of 1953-54.) Niṭṭūru, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar in front of the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1466, Śobhakṛit, (Krodhin), Bhadrapada, śu. 11, corresponding to A.D. 1544, August 28.

Records the gift of some additional plots of land in Mēḍikurti to the Nīḷakaṇṭhēśvara temple at Niṭṭūr for the merit of King Sadāśiva, Rāmarāja, Pemmasāni China Timmā nāyaka and Peddināyaka (the father of Tirumalayya) by Tirumalayya of Jakaṁpūṇḍi, belonging to the Achyuta-gōtra. (The donor may be identical with the person mentioned in No. 14 (A.R. 21 of 1953-54) except for the name of the gōtra). It is also stated that the temple of Nīḷakaṇṭhēśvara already obtained some land for aṅga-raṅga-bhōga and amṛitapaḍi of the deity. It seems to have waived some tax due from the Śrōtriyam and sthānikas of the temple.
It is significant to note that the above declaration was made by Tirumalayya on the banks of the Tuṅgabhadrā and in the presence of god Viṭṭhalēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jā(ja)yādbhu(bhyu)daya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṁṭi śō
bhakṛtu saṁvatsara bhādrapatha(da) śu 11 puṁṇyakālama
ṁdu śrīman mahārāja rājādhirāja rāja pa
ramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāśivarāya
mahārāyalu prithivīsāmrājyaṁ śēyu
cunnu Āccuta(Acyuta)gōtraṁ jakaṁpūṁḍi peddināyani ko
māruṁḍu tirumalanāyinigāriki nāyaṁka
rānaku pāliṁcci yiyyanavadhariṁccina cīrabaḍi śī

malōni niṭṭūranu Ā niṭṭūri nīlakaṁṭhēśvaruniki
pūrvamaṁdu Aṁggaraṁgga vaibhavālakunnu Amṛtapa
ḷlakunu naḍacivaccē cēnu kha 13 nnu varimaḍi kha 2 . 1
nnu tirumalayyaṁgāru tamataṁḍri peddināya
nigāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu kālvamaḍilōnu krotta
gānu nīlakaṁṭhēśvaruniki sama¨rppiṁccina maḍi 71 nnu
vubhayaṁ maḍi 2 . 1 nnu maḍuku¨rttilōnu sagaṁ
Iṁgāḍi liṁgānaku sagaṁ callaṁgānu nīlakaṁṭhadēvu
niki cellē sagabālikiṁnniṁgānu nīlakaṁṭhēśvaruni stā(sthāniku)
lu sō(śrō)triyaṁgānu pūrvānanu nagariki Accēca
kha ḍā lu Ādyaṁttamunu tuṁgabhadrātīra

viṭhalēśvaruni sāṁnidhyamaṁdu yī ya(Ē)kāda
śī puṁṇyakālamaṁddu sadāśivarāyalakuṁnnu
rāmarājuṁgārikiṁnni puṇyaṁgānu hiraṁṇyō
daka dāna dhārāpūrvakaṁgānu sarvamāṁnyaṁgānu sa
dyaḥ paricchēdaṁgānu peṁmmasāni cinatiṁmānāyaniṁ
gārikinni tirumalayyaṁgāru tamataṁḍri jakkaṁpū
ṁḍi peddināyaniṁgārikinni puṁṇyaṁgānu dhāravō
si yiccina dharma śāsanaṁ . yī sarvamāṁnya dharma śāsa
nānaku ya(E)vvaru vakrasulayinānu tama mātā pitā
lanu vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiṁccina pāpāna pōvuvāru .
brāṁhmaṇa vadhasēsina pāpānapōvuvāru . yi(Iṁ)

duku ya(E)vvaru Āśiṁsē(stē)nu śvāna kapāḷamaṁdu
dōṣasurāśunakamāṁssa(sa)ṁ kalapukatrāginavāru .
tallini cellilini paṭukoṁna pāpāna pōvuvāru .
Ēkaika(va)bhaginīlōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhō
jyā na gara(kara)grāṁhya(grāhyā) dēvadattā vasuṁdharā . svadattā
ṁppa(pa)radattāṁ vvā(vā)yōharēti vasuṁdharām . ṣaṣṭhi(ṣṭi)¨rva
¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dāna
pālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānācchē(cchrē)yōnupālanaṁ .
dānātsva¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādacyudaṁ(taṁ) padaṁ(m) .
maṁggaḷaṁmahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunu
Digital edition of SII 42.15 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
